message:
feat(search_explain): scope diagnostic checks to selected pane when pane_filter is set

Previously, NO_INDEXED_DATA, FTS_INDEX_INCONSISTENT, CAPTURE_GAPS, and
STALE_PANES diagnostics aggregated across all panes even when
pane_filter was specified. Now each check respects the pane filter:
- NO_INDEXED_DATA reports pane-specific segment count and summary
- FTS inconsistency ignores unrelated panes
- Capture gaps filter to the selected pane
- Stale pane detection scopes to the filtered pane
Also use saturating_sub for timestamp arithmetic in stale pane check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
